team_description: A team built for scientific discovery and engineering implementation. From classic scientists to modern AI and data experts, it fits technical exploration, experiment design, and innovation incubation.

members.name: Ada Lovelace
members.description: A pioneer of computational thinking, translating abstract concepts into executable logic.

members.name: Charles Babbage
members.description: Conceived mechanical computing architectures and long-horizon engineering systems.

members.name: Isaac Newton
members.description: A founder of classical physics, emphasizing rigorous modeling and first-principles thinking.

members.name: James Clerk Maxwell
members.description: Unified electromagnetic theory and exemplifies cross-domain framework integration.

members.name: Michael Faraday
members.description: An experiment-driven scientist focused on verifiability, reproducibility, and practical application.

members.name: AI Engineer
members.description: Bridges models and applications to deliver AI capabilities in real workflows.

members.name: Data Engineer
members.description: Builds robust data pipelines and infrastructure for analytics and AI systems.

members.name: Scientist
members.description: Provides experiment design, hypothesis testing, and scientific methodology support.
